campaign.title: Create a Coupon
campaign.subject: We drafted a coupon for your business - publish it?
campaign.description: Show SMB a pre-made coupon based on their business type and invite them to publish

landing_page.ai_goal: Get user to publish their first coupon

slides.title: Your Coupon Is Ready

content.headline: We Created a Coupon for your business
content.subhead: Ready to drive new customers through your door
content.visual: Coupon mockup with their business name

slides.narration: Hey there, we did something for you. We created a coupon for your business. It's ready to publish and start driving new customers through your door. Coupons on our platform get 85 redemptions on average. Want to see what we made?

slides.title: Your Coupon Preview

content.headline: Here's What We Created

coupon_preview.terms: Valid for 30 days, new customers only

content.note: Edit any of this. Change the offer, the terms, the expiration—whatever you want.

slides.narration: Here's what we created: 15% off for new customers. 15% off for new customers. Valid for thirty days. Of course, you can edit any of this—change the offer amount, the terms, the expiration. This is just a starting point based on what works well for local businesses.

slides.title: Coupons Drive Real Results

content.headline: What Coupons Actually Do
content.insight: Coupons don't just discount—they introduce. Most redeemers become regulars.

slides.narration: Here's what coupons actually do. On average, 85 people redeem each coupon. Of those, 40 percent become repeat customers. And here's the best part: people who use coupons typically spend 30% more than the coupon value. You're not losing money—you're gaining customers. And publishing is completely free.

slides.title: Where Your Coupon Goes
slides.narration: When you publish your coupon, it doesn't just sit somewhere hoping to be found. It goes to our coupon directory—15,000 people check it monthly. It gets featured in our community newsletter—10,000 subscribers. It shows up prominently on your business listing. And it becomes part of what AI knows about you. One publish, maximum visibility.

slides.title: Publish Your Coupon

content.headline: Ready to Get New Customers?

cta_primary.label: Publish This Coupon
cta_primary.description: Go live with our suggested offer

content.trust: Free forever • Edit anytime • Pause anytime
content.urgency: Coupons published today go live in tonight's newsletter

slides.narration: Ready to get new customers? Click 'Publish This Coupon' to go live with our suggested offer. Or click 'Customize First' if you want to change anything. It's free, you can edit anytime, pause anytime, and coupons published today go live in tonight's newsletter. Let's get people through your door.

email_hook.subject: We drafted a coupon for your business - publish it?
email_hook.body:
Hey there,

We created something for your business:

🎟️ 15% off for new customers
15% off for new customers

This is ready to publish and start driving people through your door.

[SEE YOUR COUPON →]

Here's what happens when you publish:

✓ Featured in our coupon directory (15,000 monthly visitors)
✓ Included in our community newsletter (10,000 subscribers)
✓ Displayed on your business listing
✓ Found by AI when people search for deals

Coupons on our platform get 85 redemptions on average.

Publishing is free. Edit anytime. Pause anytime.

[PUBLISH YOUR COUPON →]

Sarah
Fibonacco

P.S. Coupons published today go live in tonight's newsletter.

suggested_terms.restaurant: Valid on orders over $30. Dine-in only.
suggested_terms.retail: Valid on purchases over $50. Excludes sale items.
suggested_terms.service: Valid for new customers. One per household.
suggested_terms.fitness: Valid for first month. New members only.
suggested_terms.salon: Valid for new clients. One service.
